title: triage report
description: Record of which downstream skills triage enqueued, skipped, gated, or found already done. The error key is for the bail case (missing context.json scrutineer block); when set the other fields may be absent.

brief.description: Subset of brief --json the gates were derived from.

verify.description: Finding ids that had a verify run enqueued.

errors.description: Per-skill enqueue failures that did not stop the run.

error.description: Set when triage refused to run (missing scrutineer block in context.json). Other fields may be absent.
